title: API Key Auth Middleware
description: Create middleware that extracts API key from X-Agent-Key header, looks up by prefix, verifies argon2 hash, resolves the associated agent and its trust_level, and injects it into request state. Return 401 with RFC 7807 body on failure. Update last_used_at on success.
validation: Extracts API key from X-Agent-Key header
Returns 401 with RFC 7807 Problem Details on failure
Updates last_used_at timestamp on successful auth
